title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Kerala Tourism

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Kerala Tourism
jsonLd.description:
Kerala Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kerala Tourism:
Kerala Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kerala Tourism!
